task: Implement local topic and node blocking based on the existing product requirements.
acceptance: Settings has a Topic Blocking entry.
Title keywords are manually entered and displayed as removable chips.
Blocked nodes are selected from the all-nodes data source, support multiple selection, and display as removable chips.
Applicable topic lists hide topics that match a keyword or blocked node.
A list-local notice shows the count of currently loaded blocked topics.
Clicking the notice opens a bottom sheet capped at 90% screen height.
The bottom sheet lists blocked topics with match reasons and allows entering topic detail.
The feature does not call V2EX ignore/unignore and does not change blackListAtom.
constraints: Store blocked nodes by stable node.name.
Keep SearchNode single-select behavior compatible with existing callers.
Do not filter XNA, replies, notifications, member lists, or node lists.
Validate with TypeScript and browser smoke tests.
